{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142102D92B61F84CD632A153B1"}"},"total":1922},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7357020384507904792","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，多看，五个人有五种类型的爱情程栀的是轰轰烈烈，黄依依的是欢喜冤家，肖斐然的是姐弟恋，郑婉的是细水长流，陈思羽的是先婚后爱[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]有点可惜的是没看到其他四个人生孩子以及没有陈知羽的爱情故事[快哭了]好好哭，他们从青涩的大学生一步一步蜕变，一步一步成长，相遇，相识，相爱……我相信在那一个时空里，他们一定能够幸福的生活下去。[爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心]","text_exts":[{"e":38,"s":34,"text":"欢喜冤家","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%AC%A2%E5%96%9C%E5%86%A4%E5%AE%B6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177424686232A153B1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227357020384507904792%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227197053329514433592%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%AC%A2%E5%96%9C%E5%86%A4%E5%AE%B6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":47,"s":44,"text":"姐弟恋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A7%90%E5%BC%9F%E6%81%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177424686232A153B1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227357020384507904792%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227197053329514433592%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A7%90%E5%BC%9F%E6%81%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":66,"s":62,"text":"先婚后爱","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%88%E5%A9%9A%E5%90%8E%E7%88%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177424686232A153B1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227357020384507904792%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227197053329514433592%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%88%E5%A9%9A%E5%90%8E%E7%88%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712943317,"group_id":"7197053329514433592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱神金发颠文爱甜到腻死人的甜宠文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N69mUXilpBHf61N5ZGTRqYs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/79145863a1004bfaa419bd74e23aa240~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791711&x-signature=WkosXlYBT%2BaZiY8qLkdB2vdcQCo%3D","user_id":"591953592846071","user_name":"漓净"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"591953592846071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197053329514433592","book_info":{"abstract":"❗（末世重生、空间、无丧尸、偏群像、有男主、多cp、有宠物）
末世来袭，806女寝的五个人还没有意识到问题的严重性。
直到室友一个个在自己面前死去，程栀自己的脖子上也驾着一把利刃，她这才开始后悔。
或许是老天爷听到了806的不甘，不仅让806女寝全体重生，还附赠了她们一个异度空间！
重生回到末世来临的前两天，806疯狂购物。米面粮油、瓜子薯片，她们甚至还买了一台全自动麻将桌。但凡有一点用，806女寝统统收入囊中。
她们没有什么宏大的愿望，只希望自己可以囤够东西，然后直接躺平。毕竟都末世了，她们不想再卷了，只想开摆！
（正文已完结，番外随机掉落）
——分割线———避雷区——
1、主角们惜命，外面天灾不断，她们能不出门尽量都不出门，所以情节就没有那么刺激。
2、男主前期弱，没有多大的助力，后期自己出去单打独斗，会变强但是我没有具体写，因为我不太喜欢英雄救美的情节。
3、男主出场率低，感情线缓慢，她们会等世界没那么乱了，才考虑感情问题。
4、主角们不是孤儿，有家人，不会放弃家人，如果不喜欢这样的，可以直接退出了。
最后，作者肚子里没有什么墨水，如果你觉得写的不好，退出去就行，不要骂人，大家文明看书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bc16d692fccc3dd6cdafd64247488338","author":"麦小满","author_id":"","book_id":"7197053329514433592","book_name":"末世重生，806女寝靠囤货躺平","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0f8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7197053545357673019","read_count":"12143","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"609304"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"280","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/99f15f5eee74cee5529947fc79e48bd0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430862&x-signature=MptequpPK7TGwITMoEtvi5iybaQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92968127049","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"597"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142102D92B61F84CD632A153B1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_c _color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197053329514433592","book_info":{"abstract":"❗（末世重生、空间、无丧尸、偏群像、有男主、多cp、有宠物）
末世来袭，806女寝的五个人还没有意识到问题的严重性。
直到室友一个个在自己面前死去，程栀自己的脖子上也驾着一把利刃，她这才开始后悔。
或许是老天爷听到了806的不甘，不仅让806女寝全体重生，还附赠了她们一个异度空间！
重生回到末世来临的前两天，806疯狂购物。米面粮油、瓜子薯片，她们甚至还买了一台全自动麻将桌。但凡有一点用，806女寝统统收入囊中。
她们没有什么宏大的愿望，只希望自己可以囤够东西，然后直接躺平。毕竟都末世了，她们不想再卷了，只想开摆！

——分割线———避雷区——
1、主角们惜命，外面天灾不断，她们能不出门尽量都不出门，所以情节就没有那么刺激。

3、男主出场率低，感情线缓慢，她们会等世界没那么乱了，才考虑感情问题。
4、主角们不是孤儿，有家人，不会放弃家人，如果不喜欢这样的，可以直接退出了。
最后，作者肚子里没有什么墨水，如果你觉得写的不好，退出去就行，不要骂人，大家文明看书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bc16d692fccc3dd6cdafd64247488338","author":"麦小满","author_id":"","book_id":"7197053329514433592","book_name":"末世重生，806女寝靠囤货躺平","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0f8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7197053545357673019","read_count":"12143","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"609304"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"280","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/99f15f5eee74cee5529947fc79e48bd0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430862&x-signature=MptequpPK7TGwITMoEtvi5iybaQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92968127049","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.1406227e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142102D92B61F84CD632A153B1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":40,"fo
